description: CARFAX provides vehicle history reports and related automotive information products for consumers and business customers such as dealers, service shops, insurers, and lenders. Its public site also offers used-car shopping, maintenance tracking, and valuation tools.
summary: CARFAX exposes a public MCP server at `https://ai.carfax.com/v2/mcp`; no public developer-facing REST, GraphQL, or CLI surface could be verified on carfax.com.
